title: rust server vars
description: rust server vars that can be set

VARS.description: Key/value in JSON format (as an escaped string)

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

RUST_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for RUST to listen on

RUST_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for RUST to listen on

RUST_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for RUST to listen on
